_comment: Copy this file to fabrication-patterns.json (gitignored) and fill in YOUR rules. The deterministic scanner flags a submitted resume that reintroduces a phrasing your CLAUDE.md fabrication log forbids — caught reliably without an LLM. Each entry:
unless: optional negative guard — if THIS phrase is present, suppress the flag
rule: Short statement of the rule this term breaks
why: One line shown to you explaining why the submitted resume is likely the error
AnotherBannedTechName never appeared in our stack — it's a fabrication.
